<compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-dynamic-import/input.js:5:15: SLOPPYC_E_UNSUPPORTED_DYNAMIC_IMPORT: dynamic import is not supported by the Sloppy module compiler
  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-dynamic-import/input.js:5:15
   |
5 | const users = import("./users.js");
   |               ^^^^^^
hint: Use static relative imports or documented Sloppy stdlib imports.
